description: Massive potholes on the main road, hazardous to local traffic, especially motorcycles.
Traffic light malfunction at the Rangsit-Nakhon Nayok intersection, causing major rush-hour delays.
Illegal garbage dumping in the undeveloped plot near the Klong Luang industrial estate, terrible smell.

location.name: Klong Luang, Industrial Estate Side Road

description: Broken street lamp near the main entrance to Thammasat University, poor visibility for students at night.
Clogged storm drain near 'Klong 3 Road', causing road flooding after heavy rain.
Damaged bench and trash can in the 'Future Park Rangsit' bus stop area. Vandalism suspected.
Noise from late-night deliveries to the nearby minimart in a residential area.
Missing pedestrian crossing sign near the main Lam Luk Ka market.
Damaged water main on the old side road, affecting water supply to the area.

location.name: Sam Khok, Old Town Side Road

description: Persistent issue with illegal roadside vendors blocking the pedestrian walkway near the market.
Overgrown tree branches obscuring street signs on the main Klong 1 road.
Damaged pavement (loose tiles) near the school, severe risk of tripping for children.
Excessively long waiting time for the pedestrian green light, despite no approaching vehicles.
Heavy graffiti damage on the facade of the Mueang Pathum Thani District Office.
Overflowing and uncollected segregated waste bins in the Thanyaburi residential area.
Standing water on the newly constructed bike path due to inadequate drainage.
Cracked wooden bench in the municipal park. Safety hazard for users.
Lack of safety railing near the steep Klong bank next to the community playground.
Damaged surface of the community basketball court, numerous puddles after rain.
No trash bin at the corner of a busy street near Rangsit Future Park, leading to heavy littering.
Unpleasant sewage smell emanating from a manhole cover on a major road.
Large chemical spill in the industrial zone parking lot, contaminating the ground.
Blown fuse in the street lighting power box, a large residential area is unlit.
Cracked concrete slabs in the community playground, sharp edges causing injuries.
Damaged 'No Entry' sign, allowing vehicles onto the pedestrian street of the Old Market.

location.name: Mueang Pathum Thani, Old Market Street

description: No lighting at the crosswalk on the main Rattanathibet Road.
Uprooted plants and damaged flower bed in the municipal park.
Severely damaged surface of the access road to the industrial residential estate.

location.name: Klong Luang, Industrial Residential Access Road

description: Burnt out light bulb in the lamp illuminating the pedestrian underpass near the market.
Accumulation of trash and old tires on abandoned land near the university.
Major structural damage to the footbridge over Klong 1.
Excessive speed of traffic on a residential street after new road construction.
Clogged roadside gutter, causing foul standing water and mosquito breeding.
Damaged and rusted public gym equipment in the park.
Fallen tree branch blocking the sidewalk after a storm near the river.
Missing pedestrian crossing sign near the main Lam Luk Ka school.
Large sinkhole opening up in the middle of a side road near Lat Lum Kaeo.
Foul odor from a blocked sewer line next to the Khlong Nung market.
Traffic light synchronization issue causing excessive queuing on the main highway.
Heavy graffiti covering a newly painted pedestrian bridge near the river.
Faulty timer on the sprinklers in the municipal park, wasting water during rain.
Damage to the sidewalk slab, exposing underlying drainage pipes.
Missing lid on a public trash bin, allowing rain in and causing bad odors.
Stray dog pack intimidating pedestrians in the park after sunset.
Faded and dangerous crosswalk markings near a busy market.
Damaged guardrail on the road bridge near the river. Safety concern.
Street lamp out, causing a dark spot near a popular community hall.
Traffic sign on the central island is obscured by thick foliage.
Large amounts of debris from construction site left on the public street.
Broken fence around the municipal school complex, unauthorized access possible.
Loose manhole cover on a high-speed road, very noisy and dangerous.
Illegal construction of a vendor stall blocking the main sidewalk.
Broken swingset in the children's play area.
Foul sewage odor coming from a drain cover on the main road.
Missing tactile paving for the visually impaired at a major intersection.
Multiple street lights on a long stretch of road are burnt out.
Faded directional arrows on the road, causing confusion near the roundabout.
Uncollected trash pile next to a local temple, leading to health concerns.
Erosion of the riverbank sidewalk after recent heavy rains.
Repeated flooding of the main underpass during heavy rainfall.
Overgrown tree branches posing an obstruction to large vehicles on a main industrial road.
Damaged information board in the park, glass shattered.
Incorrect one-way sign installed after road works, causing confusion.

location.name: Lam Luk Ka, Old Market Area

description: Uneven paving stones on the main pedestrian street, tripping hazard.
Street lighting consistently fails during heavy rain.
Damaged public drinking fountain in the main square.
Overflowing public waste containers causing litter to be blown onto the canal bank.
Illegally parked vendor trolleys blocking the disabled access ramp near a pedestrian crossing.
Severe cracks appearing on the main Klong Luang bridge structure.
Overgrown park bushes creating hidden alcoves, security concern.
Broken basketball backboard at the community court.
Damaged road reflector posts along the highway access ramp.
Illegal dumping of construction waste in a Klong tributary.
Damaged light fixture hanging dangerously from a pole in the main square.
Uneven road surface after utility works, causing vehicles to slow sharply.
Overflowing public bins in a high-traffic market area. Urgent collection needed.
Illegal posters covering all informational signs near the market.
Large branch snapped off a tree and is currently resting precariously on power lines.
Drainage grate completely missing from the sidewalk.
Water pressure suddenly dropped in the entire housing estate.
Tree roots lifting the sidewalk slabs, danger to pedestrians.
Deep cracks and structural failure on the road leading to the Sam Khok area.
Street light flickering and then completely going out on a busy main street.
Missing tactile paving at the Mueang Pathum Thani Town Hall entrance.
Uncontrolled growth of toxic weeds in the public garden.
Vandalized historical monument with spray paint.
Unattended construction materials blocking the entire sidewalk.
Loud, persistent drilling noise from a commercial property outside legal hours.
Broken guardrail at the Lam Luk Ka canal crossing.
Large sinkhole reopened on a minor residential road.
Multiple lights out on the main highway billboard.
Damaged storm drain cover on a busy pedestrian bridge.
Illegal advertising flyers stuck to every street light pole.
Unattended construction debris overflowing from a site container.
Street light leaning dangerously after being hit by a car.
Large area of cracked and broken road surface in the industrial area.
Overgrown ornamental bushes blocking the view of the traffic mirror.
Damaged safety netting around the football field perimeter.
Loud, unauthorized temple fair music continuing late into the night.
Large area of sand/dirt washout onto the main road, causing a slip hazard.
